About Me

Turning ideas into visual experiences

I’m Sanjay, a Graphic Design student at DSEU J.H. Bhabha Campus, Mayur Vihar, Delhi. I work across both digital and traditional mediums — from packaging design and brand identity to watercolour paintings and folk art.

My work reflects a blend of Indian artistic sensibility with modern design thinking. I enjoy solving visual problems and creating work that communicates clearly and beautifully. I am always eager to learn new tools and push my creative boundaries.

Academic Work

Assignments

DSEU J.H. Bhabha · Graphic Design
01
Packaging Design
CrispBite Crunchy Cookies
Complete packaging system including flat label design, box dieline, and 3D product mockup for a chocolate cookie brand with a playful monster character.
Illustrator · Photoshop
02
Editorial Campaign
Career Anxiety Campaign
Two-page editorial poster series for CareerCompass addressing student career anxiety. Concept-driven visuals with strong typographic hierarchy and metaphorical imagery.
Photoshop · Canva
03
Automotive Poster
BMW M4 GT3 Editorial
High-impact automotive editorial poster with technical specs, multi-angle layout, bold typography and the iconic pink BMW M4 GT3 race car as the hero visual.
Adobe Photoshop
04
Automotive Poster
Porsche GT3 RS Poster
Dramatic full-bleed poster for the Porsche 911 GT3 RS in deep crimson. Large typographic treatment with cinematic lighting and detailed spec callouts.
Adobe Photoshop
05
Typography Art
Gandhi Typography Portrait
Hand-crafted typographic portrait of Mahatma Gandhi using the repeated phrase “Non-Violence” in multicolour to form his likeness. A manual art and typography exercise.
Manual · Markers & Pen
06
Watercolour Studies
Urban & Figure Watercolours
Series of watercolour studies: a busy market street scene, figures on a charpai reading newspapers, and a detailed still life of a kettle and bell pepper.
Watercolour · Brushwork
07
Folk Art
Gond Art — Birds in Trees
Traditional Gond folk art painting featuring stylised birds in decorative trees on a vivid yellow background. Intricate dot-work and pattern detailing throughout.
Acrylic & Poster Colours
08
Op Art
Barcode Op Art Illusion
Black-and-white optical art using barcode-style vertical stripes to conceal a cartoon figure. Explores perception, pattern contrast, and visual illusion techniques.
Manual · Sketch & Ink
09
Acrylic Painting
Varanasi Ghats
Detailed acrylic painting of the Varanasi ghats depicting a sadhu blowing a shankh in the holy Ganga, with temples and colourful architecture in the background.
Acrylic on Canvas
